In a large mixing bowl or other apprropriate container, toss sprouts with oil and season lightly with salt
On sheet trays, spread sprouts out in a single layer not too close together
In a preheated convection oven,  ~500°F high fan, roast the sprouts until caramelized and tender (but not soft)
Remove from oven and cool to room temperature or in a blast chiller.
Reserve in hotel pans and store in the cooler.
